title: Croptania
description: Small addon mod for Botania adding crop related utilities
body:
# Croptania

This is a small addon mod for [Botania](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botania) adding the Cropnolia- a Generating Flower that takes fully grown crops and "eats" them, producing mana proportional to the age of the crop.

The default datapack also disables the crafting recipe for Agricarnations as they are a tad extremely overpowered with this kind of generator.

This was originally created for the Stardew Valley style modpack [Society: Sunlit Valley](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/society-sunlit-valley), however it stands alone as a mod and will be maintained as any other. Any feedback/suggestions are appreciated!

## Dependencies

This mod has the following dependencies and has been tested with the following versions:

*   [Botania](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botania) by vazkii version 447. This mod will _likely_ be compatible whenever Botania updates

## Support

Questions? Comments? Suggestions? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/GdcZkrZqkj)!
